api_contracts.method: GET /{'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'sendsmsbulkviagatewayapi', 'description': 'sends sms in bulk via gatewayapi for dk, se, fi, no. builds multismsmessagedto with per-message sender/message/recipient/reference/encoding (ucs2 or gsm7). calls igatewayapiclient.sendmultiasync. on success: sets status 1211 (smsafsendtstatusafventergwapibulk), calls marksmsgroupssentasync, publishes smssentnotification per item. on failure: sets gatewayprovider on logs.', 'trigger': 'batch job via gatewayapibulk.rungatewayapibulkasync', 'source_file': 'servicealert.services/gateways/smsgateways/gatewayapi/gatewayapibulkapiworkloadprocessor.cs'}

GET /{'id': 'behavior_2', 'name': 'smsbulkpriorityrouting', 'description': 'priority sms executor runs before each country executor. countries served: dk, se, fi, no. roundrobin loader per country + priority. separate test-mode executor (countryid=0, testmode=true). smsgatewaystatuswriter handles status updates.', 'trigger': 'gatewayapibulk.rungatewayapibulkasync loop', 'source_file': 'servicealert.services/gateways/smsgateways/gatewayapibulk.cs'}

POST /{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'gatewayapideliverywebhookcallback', 'description': 'receives delivery status callbacks from gatewayapi via post /gatewayapi/callback. payload: gatewayapimobileoriginatedmessagedto. publishes standardreceivergroupmessagereceivednotification. allowanonymous. no auth required.', 'trigger': 'inbound webhook post from gatewayapi', 'source_file': 'servicealert.api/controllers/webhooks/gatewayapicontroller.cs'}

POST /{'id': 'behavior_4', 'name': 'gatewayapiinboundreplywebhook', 'description': 'receives mo (mobile-originated) sms replies via post /gatewayapi/reply. publishes inboundmessageevent (fire-and-forget, not awaited). allowanonymous.', 'trigger': 'inbound mo sms from gatewayapi', 'source_file': 'servicealert.api/controllers/webhooks/gatewayapicontroller.cs'}

POST /{'id': 'behavior_5', 'name': 'infobipdeliverystatuswebhook', 'description': 'receives infobip delivery reports via post /infobip/callback. maps infobip error codes to internal status codes: 3/7/26=501(pending), 4/9=523(undeliverable), 5/10000=522(delivered), 15/29=525(expired), 6/8/10/11/14/21/34/53/54=523(rejected). reads raw body via streamreader.', 'trigger': 'inbound webhook post from infobip', 'source_file': 'servicealert.api/controllers/webhooks/infobipwebhookcontroller.cs'}

POST /{'id': 'behavior_6', 'name': 'sendgridemailstatuswebhook', 'description': 'receives sendgrid event webhooks via post /sendgrid/setemailstatus. requires bearer + superadmin auth. deserialises sendgridrootevent array, calls updateemailmessagestatusesasync with updateemailmessagestatuscommand per event (id, smslogid, sgmessageid, status converted from event type).', 'trigger': 'inbound webhook post from sendgrid', 'source_file': 'servicealert.api/controllers/webhooks/sendgridcontroller.cs'}

POST /{'id': 'behavior_7', 'name': 'sendgridinboundemailparse', 'description': 'receives inbound emails via post /sendgrid/inboundparse. uses stronggrid webhookparser to parse multipart email. extracts text body. allowanonymous. publishes inbound parse event.', 'trigger': 'inbound email forwarded from sendgrid', 'source_file': 'servicealert.api/controllers/webhooks/sendgridcontroller.cs'}

authorization_hints: SendGrid webhook requires Bearer + SuperAdmin auth. GatewayApi and Infobip webhooks are AllowAnonymous.

{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'GatewayApiDeliveryWebhookCallback', 'description': 'Receives delivery status callbacks from GatewayApi via POST /GatewayApi/Callback. Payload: GatewayApiMobileOriginatedMessageDto. Publishes StandardReceiverGroupMessageReceivedNotification. AllowAnonymous. No auth required.', 'trigger': 'Inbound webhook POST from GatewayApi', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/Webhooks/GatewayApiController.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_6', 'name': 'SendGridEmailStatusWebhook', 'description': 'Receives SendGrid event webhooks via POST /Sendgrid/SetEmailStatus. Requires Bearer + SuperAdmin auth. Deserialises SendGridRootEvent array, calls UpdateEmailMessageStatusesAsync with UpdateEmailMessageStatusCommand per event (Id, SmsLogId, SgMessageId, Status converted from event type).', 'trigger': 'Inbound webhook POST from SendGrid', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/Webhooks/SendgridController.cs'}

blazor_pages.component: {'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'SendSmsBulkViaGatewayApi', 'description': 'Sends SMS in bulk via GatewayApi for DK, SE, FI, NO. Builds MultiSmsMessageDto with per-message Sender/Message/Recipient/Reference/Encoding (UCS2 or GSM7). Calls IGatewayApiClient.SendMultiAsync. On success: sets status 1211 (SMSafsendtStatusafventerGWapiBulk), calls MarkSmsGroupsSentAsync, publishes SmsSentNotification per item. On failure: sets GatewayProvider on logs.', 'trigger': 'Batch job via GatewayApiBulk.RunGatewayApiBulkAsync', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Gateways/SmsGateways/GatewayApi/GatewayApiBulkApiWorkloadProcessor.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'GatewayApiDeliveryWebhookCallback', 'description': 'Receives delivery status callbacks from GatewayApi via POST /GatewayApi/Callback. Payload: GatewayApiMobileOriginatedMessageDto. Publishes StandardReceiverGroupMessageReceivedNotification. AllowAnonymous. No auth required.', 'trigger': 'Inbound webhook POST from GatewayApi', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/Webhooks/GatewayApiController.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_4', 'name': 'GatewayApiInboundReplyWebhook', 'description': 'Receives MO (mobile-originated) SMS replies via POST /GatewayApi/Reply. Publishes InboundMessageEvent (fire-and-forget, not awaited). AllowAnonymous.', 'trigger': 'Inbound MO SMS from GatewayApi', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/Webhooks/GatewayApiController.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_5', 'name': 'InfobipDeliveryStatusWebhook', 'description': 'Receives Infobip delivery reports via POST /Infobip/Callback. Maps Infobip error codes to internal status codes: 3/7/26=501(pending), 4/9=523(undeliverable), 5/10000=522(delivered), 15/29=525(expired), 6/8/10/11/14/21/34/53/54=523(rejected). Reads raw body via StreamReader.', 'trigger': 'Inbound webhook POST from Infobip', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/Webhooks/InfobipWebhookController.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_6', 'name': 'SendGridEmailStatusWebhook', 'description': 'Receives SendGrid event webhooks via POST /Sendgrid/SetEmailStatus. Requires Bearer + SuperAdmin auth. Deserialises SendGridRootEvent array, calls UpdateEmailMessageStatusesAsync with UpdateEmailMessageStatusCommand per event (Id, SmsLogId, SgMessageId, Status converted from event type).', 'trigger': 'Inbound webhook POST from SendGrid', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/Webhooks/SendgridController.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_7', 'name': 'SendGridInboundEmailParse', 'description': 'Receives inbound emails via POST /Sendgrid/InboundParse. Uses StrongGrid WebhookParser to parse multipart email. Extracts text body. AllowAnonymous. Publishes inbound parse event.', 'trigger': 'Inbound email forwarded from SendGrid', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/Webhooks/SendgridController.cs'}

rules: Bulk SMS countries in order: DK, SE, FI, NO — each gets its own executor. Country 0 = test mode.
GatewayApi callback fields: userref=SmsLogs.Id (the reference we track), id=gateway-internal (ignored).
GatewayApi inbound reply (MO SMS): published fire-and-forget (not awaited, CS4014 suppressed by design).
Infobip error id 10000 = NORMAL_HANGUP (IVR calls) → maps to 522 (delivered).
MarkSmsGroupsSentAsync called after bulk batch completes — not per message.
Priority executor runs BEFORE each country executor in the loop — starved countries get priority SMS first.
SMS encoding: UCS2 when item.Data.UseUCS2 is true, otherwise GSM7.
SMS recipient field: long.Parse(phoneCode + phone) — concatenated before parsing.
SendGrid webhook requires Bearer + SuperAdmin auth. GatewayApi and Infobip webhooks are AllowAnonymous.
SmsSentNotification published per-item after successful send (MediatR Publish, not Send).
if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.
